files.oh_oai311.v:
module oh_oai311 #(parameter DW = 1 ) // array width
   (
    input [DW-1:0]  a0,
    input [DW-1:0]  a1,
    input [DW-1:0]  a2,
    input [DW-1:0]  b0,
    input [DW-1:0]  c0, 
    output [DW-1:0] z
    );
   
   assign z = ~((a0 | a1 | a2) & b0 & c0);
   
endmodule
files.oh_oai311_combined.v:
module oh_oai311 #(parameter DW = 1 ) // array width
   (
    input [DW-1:0]  a0,
    input [DW-1:0]  a1,
    input [DW-1:0]  a2,
    input [DW-1:0]  b0,
    input [DW-1:0]  c0, 
    output [DW-1:0] z
    );
   
   assign z = ~((a0 | a1 | a2) & b0 & c0);
   
endmodule

module autovcoder_081308 (
    input wire [5:0] channel,
    input wire DSP_settle,
    input wire [15:0] aux_cmd_A,
    input wire [15:0] aux_cmd_B,
    input wire [15:0] aux_cmd_C,
    input wire [15:0] aux_cmd_D,
    input wire external_digout_A,
    input wire external_digout_B,
    input wire external_digout_C,
    input wire external_digout_D,
    output wire [15:0] MOSI_cmd_A,
    output wire [15:0] MOSI_cmd_B,
    output wire [15:0] MOSI_cmd_C,
    output wire [15:0] MOSI_cmd_D
);

  MOSI_command_selector command_selector_A (
      .channel(channel),
      .DSP_settle(DSP_settle),
      .aux_cmd(aux_cmd_A),
      .digout_override(external_digout_A),
      .MOSI_cmd(MOSI_cmd_A)
  );

  MOSI_command_selector command_selector_B (
      .channel(channel),
      .DSP_settle(DSP_settle),
      .aux_cmd(aux_cmd_B),
      .digout_override(external_digout_B),
      .MOSI_cmd(MOSI_cmd_B)
  );

  MOSI_command_selector command_selector_C (
      .channel(channel),
      .DSP_settle(DSP_settle),
      .aux_cmd(aux_cmd_C),
      .digout_override(external_digout_C),
      .MOSI_cmd(MOSI_cmd_C)
  );

  MOSI_command_selector command_selector_D (
      .channel(channel),
      .DSP_settle(DSP_settle),
      .aux_cmd(aux_cmd_D),
      .digout_override(external_digout_D),
      .MOSI_cmd(MOSI_cmd_D)
  );


endmodule

files.autovcoder_070038.v:
module autovcoder_070038 (
    reset_,

    wrclk,
    wren,
    datain,
    wrfull,
    wrusedw,

    rdclk,
    rden,
    dataout,
    rdempty,
    rdusedw
);


  parameter WIDTH = 64, DEPTH = 128, PTR = 7;


  input wire reset_;

  input wire wrclk;  // Clk for writing data                              
  input wire wren;  // request to write                                  
  input  	wire [WIDTH-1 : 0]	datain;          	// Data coming in                                                   
  output wire wrfull;  // indicates fifo is full or not (To avoid overiding)
  output wire [PTR -1:0] wrusedw;  // number of slots currently in use for writing

  input wire rdclk;  // Clk for read data                                     
  input wire rden;  // Request to read from FIFO                            
  output wire [WIDTH-1 : 0] dataout;  // Data coming out                                      
  output wire rdempty;  // indicates fifo is empty or not (to avoid underflow)  
  output wire [PTR  -1 : 0] rdusedw;  // number of slots currently in use for reading         


  asynch_fifo #(
      .WIDTH(WIDTH),
      .DEPTH(DEPTH),
      .PTR  (PTR)
  ) asynch_128x256 (

      .reset_(reset_),

      .wrclk(wrclk),  // Clk to write data                                                   
      .wren(wren),  // write enable          
      .datain(datain),  // write data          
      .wrfull(wrfull),  // indicates fifo is full or not (To avoid overiding)                  
      .wrempty	(),				                    // indicates fifo is empty or not (to avoid underflow)                                                               
      .wrusedw	(wrusedw),				            // wrusedw -number of locations filled in fifo                                                                        

      .rdclk  (rdclk),    // i-1, Clk to read data                               
      .rden   (rden),     // i-1, read enable of data FIFO                                          
      .dataout(dataout),  // Dataout of data FIFO
      .rdfull (),         // indicates fifo is full or not (To avoid overiding) (Not used)         
      .rdempty(rdempty),  // indicates fifo is empty or not (to avoid underflow)      
      .rdusedw(rdusedw),  // rdusedw -number of locations filled in fifo (not used ) 

      .dbg()

  );
endmodule

files.autovcoder_052353.v:
module autovcoder_052353 (
    Data_in,
    Data_out
);
  input [31:0] Data_in;
  output [15:0] Data_out;

  ksa_top_16b_59 ksa_top_16b_inst0 (
      .c0(1'b0),
      .i_a({
        Data_in[27],
        Data_in[26],
        Data_in[25],
        Data_in[24],
        Data_in[23],
        Data_in[22],
        Data_in[21],
        Data_in[20],
        Data_in[19],
        Data_in[18],
        Data_in[17],
        Data_in[16],
        Data_in[15],
        Data_in[14],
        Data_in[13],
        Data_in[12]
      }),
      .i_b({
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        1'b0,
        Data_in[11]
      }),
      .o_s(Data_out)
  );
endmodule

files.origen_016607.v:
module origen_016607 #(
    parameter WIDTH = 32
) (
    input [2:0] Q,
    output reg [WIDTH-1:0][4:0] out
);

    integer i;

    always @(*) begin
        case(Q)
            3'b000: begin
                for (i = 0; i < WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin
                    out[i] = 5'b00000;
                end
            end
            3'b001: begin
                for (i = 0; i < WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin
                    out[i] = (i % 2 == 0) ? 5'b00000 : 5'b00001;
                end
            end
            3'b010: begin
                for (i = 0; i < WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin
                    out[i] = i % 4;
                end
            end
            3'b011: begin
                for (i = 0; i < WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin
                    out[i] = i % 8;
                end
            end
            3'b100: begin
                for (i = 0; i < WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin
                    out[i] = i % 16;
                end
            end
            3'b101: begin
                for (i = 0; i < WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin
                    out[i] = i;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                for (i = 0; i < WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin
                    out[i] = 5'bxxxxx;
                end
            end
        endcase
    end

endmodule

files.origen_116417.v:
module origen_116417(
    input [8:0] x,
    input [8:0] o,
    output logic error,
    output logic full,
    output logic winX,
    output logic winO,
    output logic noWin
);

    logic [8:0] sum;

    // Error detection
    always_comb begin
        error = 1'b0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 9; i = i + 1) begin
            if (x[i] && o[i]) begin
                error = 1'b1;
            end
        end
    end

    // Full board detection
    always_comb begin
        sum = x | o;
        full = ∑
    end

    // Win detection for X
    always_comb begin
        winX = (x[0] && x[1] && x[2]) || // Row 1
               (x[3] && x[4] && x[5]) || // Row 2
               (x[6] && x[7] && x[8]) || // Row 3
               (x[0] && x[3] && x[6]) || // Column 1
               (x[1] && x[4] && x[7]) || // Column 2
               (x[2] && x[5] && x[8]) || // Column 3
               (x[0] && x[4] && x[8]) || // Diagonal 1
               (x[2] && x[4] && x[6]);   // Diagonal 2
    end

    // Win detection for O and No-win state
    always_comb begin
        winO = (o[0] && o[1] && o[2]) || // Row 1
               (o[3] && o[4] && o[5]) || // Row 2
               (o[6] && o[7] && o[8]) || // Row 3
               (o[0] && o[3] && o[6]) || // Column 1
               (o[1] && o[4] && o[7]) || // Column 2
               (o[2] && o[5] && o[8]) || // Column 3
               (o[0] && o[4] && o[8]) || // Diagonal 1
               (o[2] && o[4] && o[6]);   // Diagonal 2

        noWin = !(winX || winO);
    end

endmodule

files.autovcoder_073200.v:
module autovcoder_073200 (
    a,
    b,
    ci,
    LEDG,
    LEDR
);

  //connecnt input LEDR output LEDG
  input [3:0] a, b;  //4-bit input
  input ci;  //carry-in
  output [8:0] LEDR;
  output [4:0] LEDG;

  wire c1, c2, c3, co;  //cout

  wire [3:0] s;  //5-bit output but because of s[4] = co, define 4-bit
  assign LEDR[7:4] = a;
  assign LEDR[3:0] = b;
  assign LEDR[8]   = ci;
  assign LEDG[3:0] = s;
  assign LEDG[4]   = co;  //co = s[4]

  FA F1 (
      a[0],
      b[0],
      ci,
      s[0],
      c1
  );  //cin = ci cout = c1
  FA F2 (
      a[1],
      b[1],
      c1,
      s[1],
      c2
  );  //cin = c1 cout = c2
  FA F3 (
      a[2],
      b[2],
      c2,
      s[2],
      c3
  );  //cin = c2 cout = c3
  FA F4 (
      a[3],
      b[3],
      c3,
      s[3],
      co
  );  //cin = c3 cout = c4

endmodule

files.autovcoder_011287.v:
module autovcoder_011287 #(
    parameter width = 8
) (
      input  io_master_clk_i
    , input  io_serdes_clk_i
    , input  io_strobe_i
    , input  D8_i
    , input  D7_i
    , input  D6_i
    , input  D5_i
    , input  D4_i
    , input  D3_i
    , input  D2_i
    , input  D1_i
    , output Q_o
);

  logic oserdes_master_shiftout_1_lo;
  logic oserdes_master_shiftout_2_lo;
  logic oserdes_slave_shiftout_3_lo;
  logic oserdes_slave_shiftout_4_lo;

  // Using two OSERDES2 in cascade mode to get 2x width
  OSERDES2 #(
        .DATA_WIDTH  (width)
      , .DATA_RATE_OQ("SDR")
      , .DATA_RATE_OT("SDR")
      , .SERDES_MODE ("MASTER")
      , .OUTPUT_MODE ("SINGLE_ENDED")
  ) oserdes_master (
      .OQ(Q_o)
      , .OCE(1'b1)
      , .CLK0(io_serdes_clk_i)
      , .CLK1()
      , .IOCE(io_strobe_i)
      , .RST(1'b0)
      , .CLKDIV(io_master_clk_i)
      , .D4(D8_i)
      , .D3(D7_i)
      , .D2(D6_i)
      , .D1(D5_i)
      , .TQ()
      , .T1(1'b0)
      , .T2(1'b0)
      , .T3(1'b0)
      , .T4(1'b0)
      , .TRAIN(1'b0)
      , .TCE(1'b1)
      , .SHIFTIN1(1'b1)
      , .SHIFTIN2(1'b1)
      , .SHIFTIN3(oserdes_slave_shiftout_3_lo)
      , .SHIFTIN4(oserdes_slave_shiftout_4_lo)
      , .SHIFTOUT1(oserdes_master_shiftout_1_lo)
      , .SHIFTOUT2(oserdes_master_shiftout_2_lo)
      , .SHIFTOUT3()
      , .SHIFTOUT4()
  );

  OSERDES2 #(
        .DATA_WIDTH  (width)
      , .DATA_RATE_OQ("SDR")
      , .DATA_RATE_OT("SDR")
      , .SERDES_MODE ("SLAVE")
      , .OUTPUT_MODE ("SINGLE_ENDED")
  ) oserdes_slave (
      .OQ()
      , .OCE(1'b1)
      , .CLK0(io_serdes_clk_i)
      , .CLK1()
      , .IOCE(io_strobe_i)
      , .RST(1'b0)
      , .CLKDIV(io_master_clk_i)
      , .D4(D4_i)
      , .D3(D3_i)
      , .D2(D2_i)
      , .D1(D1_i)
      , .TQ()
      , .T1(1'b0)
      , .T2(1'b0)
      , .T3(1'b0)
      , .T4(1'b0)
      , .TRAIN(1'b0)
      , .TCE(1'b1)
      , .SHIFTIN1(oserdes_master_shiftout_1_lo)
      , .SHIFTIN2(oserdes_master_shiftout_2_lo)
      , .SHIFTIN3(1'b1)
      , .SHIFTIN4(1'b1)
      , .SHIFTOUT1()
      , .SHIFTOUT2()
      , .SHIFTOUT3(oserdes_slave_shiftout_3_lo)
      , .SHIFTOUT4(oserdes_slave_shiftout_4_lo)
  );

endmodule

files.origen_021286.v:
module origen_021286(
    input clk50, clr, key0, key1,
    output clk1,
    output reg [6:0] out0, out1, out2, out3, out4
);

    wire clk1;
    clk50mto1 clock_divider(.clk50(clk50), .clk1(clk1));

    reg [1:0] state;
    reg [2:0] S;
    reg [1:0] i;

    always @(posedge clk1 or posedge clr) begin
        if (clr) begin
            state <= 2'b00;
            S <= 3'b000;
            i <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                2'b00: begin // Normal operation
                    S <= S + 1;
                    if (S == 3'b100) S <= 3'b000;
                end
                2'b01: begin // Slow operation
                    i <= i + 1;
                    if (i == 2'b11) begin
                        S <= S + 1;
                        if (S == 3'b100) S <= 3'b000;
                        i <= 2'b00;
                    end
                end
            endcase

            if (key0) state <= 2'b00;
            if (key1) state <= 2'b01;
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        case (S)
            3'b000: begin
                out0 = 7'b0001001; // H
                out1 = 7'b0000110; // E
                out2 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out3 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out4 = 7'b0000001; // O
            end
            3'b001: begin
                out0 = 7'b0000001; // O
                out1 = 7'b0001001; // H
                out2 = 7'b0000110; // E
                out3 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out4 = 7'b1000111; // L
            end
            3'b010: begin
                out0 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out1 = 7'b0000001; // O
                out2 = 7'b0001001; // H
                out3 = 7'b0000110; // E
                out4 = 7'b1000111; // L
            end
            3'b011: begin
                out0 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out1 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out2 = 7'b0000001; // O
                out3 = 7'b0001001; // H
                out4 = 7'b0000110; // E
            end
            3'b100: begin
                out0 = 7'b0000110; // E
                out1 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out2 = 7'b1000111; // L
                out3 = 7'b0000001; // O
                out4 = 7'b0001001; // H
            end
            default: begin
                out0 = 7'b1111111; // All segments off
                out1 = 7'b1111111;
                out2 = 7'b1111111;
                out3 = 7'b1111111;
                out4 = 7'b1111111;
            end
        endcase
    end

endmodule

module clk50mto1(
    input clk50,
    output reg clk1
);

    reg [24:0] counter;

    always @(posedge clk50) begin
        if (counter == 25'd24999999) begin
            counter <= 25'd0;
            clk1 <= ~clk1;
        end else begin
            counter <= counter + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

files.origen_054246.v:
module origen_054246 (
    input [15:0] v,
    input s,
    output [15:0] a0,
    output [15:0] a1
);
    assign a0 = (s == 0) ? v : 16'bx;
    assign a1 = (s == 1) ? v : 16'bx;
endmodule

module DEMUX_1_4 (
    input [15:0] v,
    input [1:0] s,
    output [15:0] a0,
    output [15:0] a1,
    output [15:0] a2,
    output [15:0] a3
);
    wire [15:0] w0, w1;

    DEMUX_1_2 demux_level1 (
        .v(v),
        .s(s[1]),
        .a0(w0),
        .a1(w1)
    );

    DEMUX_1_2 demux_level2_0 (
        .v(w0),
        .s(s[0]),
        .a0(a0),
        .a1(a1)
    );

    DEMUX_1_2 demux_level2_1 (
        .v(w1),
        .s(s[0]),
        .a0(a2),
        .a1(a3)
    );
endmodule

module DEMUX_1_16 (
    input [15:0] v,
    input [3:0] s,
    output [15:0] a0,
    output [15:0] a1,
    output [15:0] a2,
    output [15:0] a3,
    output [15:0] a4,
    output [15:0] a5,
    output [15:0] a6,
    output [15:0] a7,
    output [15:0] a8,
    output [15:0] a9,
    output [15:0] a10,
    output [15:0] a11,
    output [15:0] a12,
    output [15:0] a13,
    output [15:0] a14,
    output [15:0] a15
);
    wire [15:0] w0, w1, w2, w3;

    DEMUX_1_4 demux_master (
        .v(v),
        .s(s[3:2]),
        .a0(w0),
        .a1(w1),
        .a2(w2),
        .a3(w3)
    );

    DEMUX_1_4 demux_branch0 (
        .v(w0),
        .s(s[1:0]),
        .a0(a0),
        .a1(a1),
        .a2(a2),
        .a3(a3)
    );

    DEMUX_1_4 demux_branch1 (
        .v(w1),
        .s(s[1:0]),
        .a0(a4),
        .a1(a5),
        .a2(a6),
        .a3(a7)
    );

    DEMUX_1_4 demux_branch2 (
        .v(w2),
        .s(s[1:0]),
        .a0(a8),
        .a1(a9),
        .a2(a10),
        .a3(a11)
    );

    DEMUX_1_4 demux_branch3 (
        .v(w3),
        .s(s[1:0]),
        .a0(a12),
        .a1(a13),
        .a2(a14),
        .a3(a15)
    );
endmodule

    clka,
    ena,
    wea,
    addra,
    dina,
    douta,
    clkb,
    enb,
    web,
    addrb,
    dinb,
    doutb
);

  input clka;
  input ena;
  input [3 : 0] wea;
  input [13 : 0] addra;
  input [31 : 0] dina;
  output [31 : 0] douta;
  input clkb;
  input enb;
  input [3 : 0] web;
  input [13 : 0] addrb;
  input [31 : 0] dinb;

      .C_HAS_REGCEB(0),

      .C_HAS_SOFTECC_OUTPUT_REGS_B(0),

files.autovcoder_129212.v:
module autovcoder_129212 (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire SCK_EN,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg SCK,
    output reg CS,
    output reg MOSI
);
    reg [2:0] bit_count;
    reg [7:0] shift_reg;
    reg sending;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            SCK <= 0;
            CS <= 1;
            MOSI <= 0;
            bit_count <= 0;
            shift_reg <= 0;
            sending <= 0;
        end else begin
            if (SCK_EN) begin
                if (sending) begin
                    SCK <= ~SCK; // Toggle the clock
                    if (SCK) begin
                        MOSI <= shift_reg[7]; // Send the most significant bit
                        shift_reg <= {shift_reg[6:0], 1'b0}; // Shift left
                        bit_count <= bit_count + 1;
                    end
                    if (bit_count == 7) begin
                        sending <= 0; // Finished sending data
                        CS <= 1; // Deactivate chip select
                    end
                end else begin
                    if (bit_count == 0) begin
                        CS <= 0; // Activate chip select
                        shift_reg <= data_in; // Load data into shift register
                        sending <= 1; // Start sending
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
endmodule

    input wire [31:0] din,

    output wire busy,
    output wire match,

);

        .DIN(din),
        .WE(we),
        .WR_ADDR(wr_addr),
        .BUSY(busy),
        .MATCH(match),
        .MATCH_ADDR(match_addr),
        .EN(1'b1),
        .MULTIPLE_MATCH(),
        .READ_WARNING(),

    );

endmodule
